title: waltheria glabribracteata
intro: Waltheria glabribracteata is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, commonly known as the 'Waltheria' or 'Pride of India', characterized by its large, white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Waltheria glabribracteata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Waltheria glabribracteata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
